name: Patanjali RBL Bank Swarn Credit Card

domestic: 2 complimentary visits per quarter, unlocked by spending ₹50,000 or more in the preceding calendar quarter

milestones.label: ₹1,500 Patanjali shopping voucher on annual spends of ₹3 Lakhs (incl. ₹12,000 at Patanjali)
4-night/5-day Patanjali Wellness stay on annual spends of ₹5 Lakhs (incl. ₹15,000 at Patanjali)

milestoneBenefits: Earn ₹1,500 Patanjali voucher on annual spends of ₹3 Lakhs (minimum ₹12,000 at Patanjali)
Earn 4-night/5-day Patanjali Wellness stay on annual spends of ₹5 Lakhs (minimum ₹15,000 at Patanjali)
additionalBenefits: Welcome benefit of 6,000 Reward Points (worth ₹1,500) on first transaction of ₹1,000 or more within 30 days of card issuance
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie ticket (up to ₹200 off) on BookMyShow once a month on weekends
additionalDetails: 10% cashback on Patanjali spends is credited directly to the credit card statement.
Base spends earn reward points which can be redeemed via the RBL Rewards portal (rblrewards.rbl.bank.in) for travel or brand vouchers at Rs 0.25 per point.
Redemption fee of ₹99 + GST applies per portal redemption request.
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% at all fuel stations for transactions between ₹400 and ₹5,000 (Max waiver ₹200/month).
10% cashback is applicable on Patanjali spends for transactions of ₹500 or more.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via RBL Rewards portal

salaried: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable income source meeting bank criteria
selfEmployed: Minimum age: 21 years, Maximum age: 70 years
Stable business income meeting bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
10% cashback on Patanjali spends is capped at ₹750 per month.
The card is offered on both RuPay and Visa networks, allowing UPI linkage for the RuPay variant.
